name: Bailey's Irish Cream Mousse Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg yolks until lemon-colored. Add salt and Bailey's.
2. Cook mixture in top of double boiler until thickens. Cool.
3. Beat egg whites until stiff.
4. Combine egg/Bailey's mixture, egg whites, and 2/3 of the Kool-Aid Whip using a folding motion.
5. Fold in 3/4 cup of the chopped walnut meat.
6. Scrape into a baked pie shell.
7. Cover with remaining whipped topping.
8. Sprinkle with remaining nut meats and chocolate shavings.
9. Freeze for 4 hours (no more than 8).
